aboutTitle: Two decades of getting it right.
aboutParagraphs: IRONWOOD started in 2007 when Matt Irons left the big firms to serve his own neighbourhood. What began as one van and a reputation for turning up on time is now Manchester's most trusted home-services team.
No call-out fees. No hidden charges. Clear quotes, tidy work, and a 12-month guarantee on every job — no exceptions.
Every engineer is qualified, background-checked, and trained to explain the work in plain English. No jargon, no upsells, no surprises.

reviews.name: Gemma Patel
reviews.text: Burst pipe at 11pm on a Tuesday. IRONWOOD were here in 45 minutes. Lifesavers.

reviews.name: Dave O'Connor
reviews.text: New boiler fitted last month. Tidy, polite, explained everything. Best of four quotes.

reviews.name: The Khans
reviews.text: Used them for a full bathroom. Plumbing, tiling, joinery — one team, zero stress.
